# multipart struct binding rejects fields whose type is not a supported
# scalar/slice or *multipart.FileHeader / []*multipart.FileHeader

! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=T
stderr 'failed to generate parse statements for multipart field File'

-- in.go --
package main

import "mime/multipart"

type (
	T  struct{}
	In struct {
		File multipart.File
	}
)

func (T) Upload(m In) int { return 0 }
-- template.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed template.gohtml
var templatesDir embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesDir, "template.gohtml"))
-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.22
-- template.gohtml --
{{define "POST / Upload(multipart)" }}<p>{{.}}</p>{{end}}
